title: BTBT Stock Firms Up As Q1 2026 Earnings Catalyst Nears
text: The key near-term catalyst for BTBT is Q1 2026 earnings on May 14, 2026, plus a live management webcast. Management has already said Q1 2026 will spotlight BTBT's Ethereum infrastructure push and its AI/HPC angle through majority ownership of WhiteFiber (WYFI). BTBT's stock rose nearly 20% in midday trade, hitting an over two-month high of $2.17, marking the biggest single-day gain for the shares since November 2024. The rally followed the company's announcement that it had hired a new head of investor relations ahead of first-quarter earnings. Bit Digital's latest year showed revenue rising to $113.6M while it exited non-core lines and leaned hard into Ethereum infrastructure and AI compute through majority-owned WhiteFiber. As of March 31, 2026, BTBT held about 155,444 ETH worth $327M, with 62% staked at a 2.9% annualized yield, plus 27M WhiteFiber shares valued around $322.1M. Based on analysis of 5 Wall Street analysts, BTBT has a bullish consensus with a median price target of $5.00, implying a 173.2% upside from the current $1.83 trading level. Five analysts actively cover the stock, and all currently maintain Buy ratings. Bit Digital is burning cash with negative operating cash flow and big losses tied to growth projects, yet it also holds over $118M in cash, manageable debt, and trades below book value—BTBT has runway, but not unlimited time, to prove that Ethereum infrastructure and AI/HPC via WhiteFiber are more than buzzwords.
